items.final_wording: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth nausea and vomiting documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

items.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded symptom, hydration, pregnancy, medicine and associated-feature assessment without assigning cause.

items.final_wording: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth nausea and vomiting documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.

items.rationale: Relevant to concern features actually assessed; absence cannot be presumed.

items.final_wording: States that testing is history-directed and lists glucose, blood count, inflammatory markers, electrolytes, stool culture, and urinalysis.

items.final_wording: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.
